signals.why: A former bitcoin miner converting 401MW into a 20-year hyperscale AI lease validates the miner-to-HPC conversion trade and re-prices every mid-cap power-and-shell asset with grid access.
signals.evidence: Executed a 20-year lease with Anthropic at its Kentucky campus for ~401 MW of critical IT load, expected to generate approximately $19 billion of contracted revenue; stock +7-10% on the day.

signals.trend: IBD biotech flips from safety-scare to M&A target
signals.why: June 30 data showing obefazimod malignancies in line with background rates sent Abivax up ~60% in a week and let it close an upsized $920M ADS offering — re-arming the highest-conviction IBD buyout story.
signals.evidence: Announced closing of a $920M public offering (7.36M ADSs at $125) with underwriters' option fully exercised, funding US commercialization.

signals.evidence: FreeReels became the most downloaded short-drama app globally, surpassing 100M installs and growing 123% quarter-on-quarter; six short-drama apps ranked in the worldwide Top 40 by downloads.
